settings.activeColor.desc: Color of the icons when active.
settings.activeColor.label: Active icon color
settings.hideInactive.desc: Hide microphone, camera, and screen icons when there are inactive.
settings.hideInactive.label: Hide inactive states
settings.enableToast.desc: Show toast messages when one of the states changes.
settings.enableToast.label: Enable toast notifications
settings.inactiveColor.desc: Color of the icons when inactive.
settings.inactiveColor.label: Inactive icon color
settings.iconSpacing.desc: Set the spacing between the icons.
settings.iconSpacing.label: Icon spacing
settings.removeMargins.desc: Remove all outer margins of the widget.
settings.removeMargins.label: Remove margins
settings.micFilterRegex.desc: Regex pattern to filter out microphone applications. Matching apps are completely excluded from detection.
settings.micFilterRegex.label: Microphone filter regex
settings.camFilterRegex.desc: Regex pattern to filter out camera applications. Matching apps are completely excluded from detection.
settings.camFilterRegex.label: Camera filter regex
history.title: Access History
